files.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Test for hello.py - verify it prints 'Hello, World!' to stdout"""

def test_hello_prints_correct_message():
    """Test that hello.py prints 'Hello, World!' to stdout"""
    import subprocess
    import sys

    # Run hello.py and capture stdout
    result = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, 'hello.py'],
        capture_output=True,
        text=True,
        cwd='/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-3ipi0ky1'
    )

    # Verify it printed to stdout
    assert result.stdout == 'Hello, World!\n', \
        f"Expected 'Hello, World!\\n' in stdout, got: {repr(result.stdout)}"

    # Verify no errors
    assert result.returncode == 0, \
        f"Script failed with exit code {result.returncode}, stderr: {result.stderr}"

if __name__ == '__main__':
    test_hello_prints_correct_message()
    print("✓ Test passed")
